product.title: Clinique Even Better Makeup Liquid Foundation SPF 15 With Vitamin C For Dry + Oily Combination Skin Types | Medium Coverage + Natural Finish | Evens Skin Tone + Reduces Dark Spots

primaryFeatures.color: AL Ivory CN 28 - very fair, cool-neutral undertones

featureBullets: DERMATOLOGIST-DEVELOPED FOUNDATION WITH VITAMIN C: Liquid foundation delivers 24-hour moderate coverage with a natural matte finish.
FACE MAKEUP FOR EVEN BETTER SKIN: Visibly reduces dark spots in 12 weeks.* *Clinical testing conducted on 22 women.
COMFORTABLE, FLEXIBLE WEAR: With BetterFlex Technology, this natural-finish foundation makeup moves when you move and smiles when you smile. 24-hour defense against poring, caking, and streaking.
CLINICAL EXPERTISE: Allergy tested. 100% fragrance free. Ophthalmologist tested. Non-acnegenic.

BUILT ON DERMATOLOGICAL SCIENCE: As a dermatologist-guided brand, Clinique’s commitment to safety starts with skincare science. We partner with the best minds in dermatology and formulate for all skin types, tones, concerns—in service of all skin.

specification.value: AL Ivory CN 28 - very fair, cool-neutral undertones
Visibly reduces dark spots after 12 weeks of daily use.* *Clinical testing conducted on 22 women.
#1,249 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #17 in Foundation Makeup
Evens Skin Tone, SPF Protection, Waterproof
Alcohol Free, Gluten Free, Sodium Lauryl Ether Sulfate Free, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate Free, Synthetic Color Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides good coverage, with one mentioning it lasts through a full work day, and appreciate its natural finish that makes them look healthy. The product feels light on the face and goes on smoothly without being cakey, while being especially suitable for dry skin and leaving it feeling hydrated. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin tone perfectly, others find it too dark. Value for money opinions are divided between those who consider it good value and those who find it overpriced.

reviews.reviewTitle: Know your shade before you buy. Long-lasting and very good coverage without being cakey.
reviews.reviewText: Clinique is the best brand of makeup for young women with bad skin. It covers spots well. They have many shades to match your skin tone, but I recommend going to the Clinique reps. and letting them pick your color out. It's very easy to apply using a sponge or your fingers. It's not cakey. It has a good texture and stays on very well but it is a little thick. I use a moisturizer foundation now because it is a lot lighter coverage and looks more natural.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Lasts a long time works great.
reviews.reviewText: This clinique foundation feels lightweight on the skin and provides smooth even coverage it blends easily and looks natural throughout the day it does not feel heavy or greasy and works well for sensitive skin the finish is polished and reliable for everyday wear.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 2, 2026

productSpecs.color: AK Fair CN 20 - very fair, cool-neutral undertones

reviews.reviewText: I bought 2 different shades and this one arrived to me already opened 🤢. It looks as though someone else used it and wiped the opening off. Now as far as the actual product, totally different outcome! I’ve been on the search for a foundation for a while now. This is my first time trying Clinique and deriving from the 1st bottle ~&gt,it’s a great foundation! Not too heavy nor too thin , it’s giving me the perfect amount of coverage. 🥰 For the past 2 years or so the spots, dots and splotches on my face (mostly sun damage) have become much more noticeable. I’ve never been a huge makeup person and I don’t like the look of heavy foundation at all. So, I believe that I have found my perfect partner! I have somewhat dry skin and it gives just enough moisture to hydrate my skin without it feeling greasy. It absorbs in good time and best of all it doesn’t feel sticky 🙏. I poured the contents of the what appeared to be an opened bottle into a different bottle and I’m just going to happily carry on! My search is over! 2+ yrs and several $$ later. By the way, I don’t usually write reviews. I’ve maybe written 2-3 in my whole life and I’m almost 60y/o. So, yeah, it’s that good 😊 👍
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 4, 2025

productSpecs.color: AV Neutral CN 52 - moderately fair, cool-neutral undertones

reviews.reviewText: Amazing! I’ve been trying a lot of foundations and to be honest, I used to wear this for a long time and then I wanted to try other foundations. Most of you understand how that is… Well, my other foundation I’ve been using for a while just stopped sitting right, especially with my mature dry skin… I’m 60 and have wrinkles, dry patches… Etc. So I thought I would try this again since it’s been about five years… I’m so glad that I did! The trick is to use very little and then build it up… I like a more high medium coverage and one application is good but then I go over my cheeks with a beauty blender or a dry sponge and I’m telling you how much I use, maybe the amount of a pinky fingernail for my whole face. My skin looks fresh, not cakey, glowing (just right amount), I’m so pleased. To Note: I have fair (slight) cool-neutral undertones. I usually wear shades like Shiseido synchro in 120, Fenty luminous 120, etc. just to give you an idea if you are fair like me. I ordered Breeze, CN02, the Cool Neutrals with Clinique, are not like other foundations with it leaning very pink
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026
